common.h(3) Library Functions Manual common.h(3)

NAME

common.h - Shared structures and macros for registry implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct registry_entry_t
Registry entry - stores option definition with mode bitmask and metadata. struct category_builder_t
Category builder structure - maps categories to their entry arrays.

Macros


#define REGISTRY_TERMINATOR()
Initialize a terminator entry (sentinel value for array end) Uses designated initializers to properly initialize all fields to zero/NULL.

Typedefs


typedef const void *(* mode_default_getter_fn) (asciichat_mode_t mode)
Mode-aware default value getter function type.

Detailed Description

Shared structures and macros for registry implementation.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file options/registry/common.h.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define REGISTRY_TERMINATOR()

Value:

{.long_name = NULL,                                                                                                  \


 .short_name = '\0',                                                                                                 \


 .type = OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,                                                                                           \


 .offset = 0,                                                                                                        \


 .default_value = NULL,                                                                                              \


 .mode_default_getter = NULL,                                                                                        \


 .default_value_size = 0,                                                                                            \


 .help_text = NULL,                                                                                                  \


 .group = NULL,                                                                                                      \


 .arg_placeholder = NULL,                                                                                            \


 .required = false,                                                                                                  \


 .env_var_name = NULL,                                                                                               \


 .validate_fn = NULL,                                                                                                \


 .parse_fn = NULL,                                                                                                   \


 .owns_memory = false,                                                                                               \


 .optional_arg = false,                                                                                              \


 .mode_bitmask = OPTION_MODE_NONE,                                                                                   \


 .metadata = {0}}




Initialize a terminator entry (sentinel value for array end) Uses
    designated initializers to properly initialize all fields to zero/NULL.

Typedef
  Documentation




typedef
  const void *(* mode_default_getter_fn) (asciichat_mode_t mode)


Mode-aware default value getter function type. Returns the default
    value for an option based on the current mode. Used for options that have
    different defaults per mode (e.g., log-file, port, websocket-port).




Parameters


mode The mode to get the default for


Returns


Pointer to the default value for this mode (must remain
  valid)


Definition at line 26 of file
    options/registry/common.h.
